lead: Exploring the intersection of technology and health, from AI matchmaking to telehealth advancements.

stories.title: Grindr tests AI match-making in Australia amid dating app fatigue and safety concerns
stories.summary: Grindr is introducing AI-driven subscription features in Australia to tackle user fatigue and safety concerns in dating apps. The new features, which come at a high price, aim to enhance the matchmaking experience for its 15 million global users. This move highlights the growing reliance on AI in personal relationships and the challenges faced by dating platforms.

stories.title: The Best Smart Scales of 2026 for Measuring Body Fat, Muscle Mass and More
stories.summary: Smart scales are becoming essential tools for health tracking, providing insights into body composition metrics like fat and muscle mass. This article reviews the best options available in 2026, emphasizing the importance of monitoring health metrics in a tech-driven world. With user-friendly interfaces and connectivity features, these scales are ideal for anyone looking to maintain or improve their health.

stories.title: 5 Must-Have Healthy Foods to Keep Your Heart Pumping
stories.summary: Maintaining heart health is crucial, and this article lists five essential foods to include in your diet. From leafy greens to nuts, these foods are not only nutritious but also support cardiovascular health. Incorporating these items into your grocery list can help promote a healthier lifestyle and prevent heart-related issues.

stories.title: Mind launches inquiry into AI and mental health after Guardian investigation
stories.summary: Following a Guardian investigation that revealed dangerous medical advice from Google's AI Overviews, the mental health charity Mind is launching an inquiry into AI's role in mental health. This year-long commission aims to evaluate the risks and necessary safeguards as AI becomes increasingly integrated into mental health support systems.

stories.title: Blackbird-backed telehealth startup Eucalyptus sells for $1.6 billion to US listed rival
stories.summary: Eucalyptus, a telehealth startup backed by Blackbird, has been acquired for $1.6 billion by Hims & Hers Health, expanding access to telehealth services globally. This acquisition reflects the growing trend of digital health solutions and the increasing demand for accessible healthcare options in the modern landscape.

stories.title: Best Electric Toothbrush, Backed by Real-Life Testing (2026)
stories.summary: Choosing the right electric toothbrush can significantly impact oral health. This article reviews the best electric toothbrushes of 2026 based on real-life testing, emphasizing features that promote healthier teeth and gums. With advancements in technology, these toothbrushes offer various benefits that can enhance daily dental hygiene routines.

stories.title: America desperately needs new privacy laws
stories.summary: The need for new privacy laws in America is becoming increasingly urgent, especially in health-related sectors. With the rise of digital health technologies, safeguarding personal health data is critical. This article discusses the historical context and the pressing need for comprehensive privacy regulations to protect citizens' rights.

stories.title: Healthcare security: Write login details on whiteboard, hope for the best
stories.summary: A troubling report highlights the lax security measures in healthcare, where sensitive login information is often written on whiteboards. This raises significant concerns about data protection in an industry that handles sensitive health information. The article calls for stronger security protocols to safeguard patient data.
